title: Sensitive Data Exposure - Admin Application Configuration
description: The /rest/admin/application-configuration endpoint exposes the full application configuration including server base URL, domain configuration, chatBot model and settings (gemma4:e4b), social media links, altcoin name, privacy contact email, and other internal system details. While it requires admin JWT authentication, the sensitive data disclosure aids further attacks.
poc: GET /rest/admin/application-configuration with admin JWT → Full config JSON returned
proof: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer <admin_jwt>" "http://127.0.0.1:3011/rest/admin/application-configuration" → {"config":{"server":{"port":3000,"baseUrl":"http://localhost:3000"},"application":{"domain":"juice-sh.op","name":"OWASP Juice Shop"},"chatBot":{"model":"gemma4:e4b"}...}} - full config exposed

proof_excerpts.excerpt: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer <admin_jwt>" "http://127.0.0.1:3011/rest/admin/application-configuration" → {"config":{"server":{"port":3000,"baseUrl":"http://localhost:3000"},"application":{"domain":"juice-sh.op","name":"OWASP Juice Shop"},"chatBot":{"model":"gemma4:e4b"}...}} - full config exposed
